name: Patient Case
history: Childhood experiences of emotional invalidation (e.g., being reprimanded for crying). History of depression.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I express my emotions, I will be reprimanded or rejected.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't change how I feel, and it will always be this way.
coping_strategies: Avoid expressing emotions to prevent rejection.
situation: Reconnecting with an individual named Edson after a period of no contact.
auto_thought: If I reconnect with Edson, he might reject me again.
behavior: Hesitation to fully engage or express emotions in the relationship.
